LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT WILLIAM ELLIS AND ELLIS EYE & LASER MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR A COURT ORDER DIRECTING PETITIONER AND PETITIONER'S ATTORNEY TO PAY ARBITRATION FEES IS DENIED. A DISPUTE REGARDING ARBITRATION RULES OR PROCEDURES IS PROPERLY ADDRESSED TO THE ARBITRATOR IN THE FIRST INSTANCE. THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING THE COMPLETION OF THE ARBITRATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion For A Court Order Directing Petitioner And Petitioner'S Attorney To Pay Arbitration Fees
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT WILLIAM ELLIS and ELLIS EYE & LASER MEDICAL CENTER'S Motion For A Court Order Directing Petitioner And Petitioner's Attorney To Pay Arbitration Fees is denied. A dispute regarding arbitration rules or procedures is properly addressed to the arbitrator in the first instance. This action is stayed pending the completion of the arbitration. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
